SEARCH
Package xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems

Class DuelManager

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Subsystems.DuelManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class DuelManager extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
a system for duels that adds the ability to challenge other players with. players can create custom kits as well as choosing the arena type.
